# Advisor Tool Checks

## Scan for Advisor Usage

```bash qmd:name=advisor-scan
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5050/api/advisor/scan | jq
```

## View Advisor Stats

```bash qmd:name=advisor-stats
curl -s http://localhost:5050/api/advisor/stats | jq
```

## List Recent Advisor Usages

```bash qmd:name=advisor-usages
curl -s 'http://localhost:5050/api/advisor/usages?limit=10' | jq '.items[] | {project, executor_model, advisor_model, duration_seconds, status}'
```
